description: Golden dataset for precision and recall metric testing

queries.query: What is the default chunk size in SecondBrain?
queries.expected_answer: The default chunk size is 4096 tokens.

queries.query: How do I configure MongoDB connection URI?
What document formats are supported for ingestion?
queries.expected_answer: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, HTML, Markdown, images, and audio.

queries.query: How to enable circuit breaker for resilience?
What is the purpose of the Ingestor class?
queries.expected_answer: The Ingestor class handles multi-format document parsing and chunking.

queries.query: How do I perform semantic search over my documents?
queries.expected_answer: Use the secondbrain search command with a natural language query.
Default model is all-MiniLM-L6-v2 from sentence-transformers.

queries.query: How to configure chunk size and overlap?
queries.expected_answer: Use SECONDBRAIN_CHUNK_SIZE and SECONDBRAIN_CHUNK_OVERLAP environment variables.

queries.query: What is the rate limiting configuration?
queries.expected_answer: Set SECONDBRAIN_RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED=true and configure requests per second.
Set SECONDBRAIN_LOG_LEVEL and SECONDBRAIN_LOG_FORMAT environment variables.
